event.title: BInnovative With Women In Tech
event.zoomInfo: Single Zoom link for the full day — join any session remotely from other offices.
event.audience: IT, InfoSec, and CCO teams. Open to all offices via Zoom.
event.cost: Free — fully sponsored by Women in Technology.
event.lunchInfo: Provided at no cost — all expenses covered by WIT.

agenda.title: Registration, Networking & Coffee
agenda.description: Check in, grab coffee, and connect with peers before the day kicks off.

agenda.title: Opening Keynote
agenda.speaker: Manisha — WIT Chair
agenda.description: Vision for innovation and inclusion at Bessemer. Setting the stage for BInnovative.

agenda.title: Keynote: [Topic TBD]

agenda.description: Keynote presentation — topic to be announced.

agenda.speaker: Patrick
agenda.description: Keynote presentation — topic to be announced.

agenda.title: Keynote: Importance of Data for AI
agenda.speaker: Eva Dave
agenda.description: Why data quality, governance, and strategy are the foundation for every successful AI initiative.

agenda.title: Demo Roadmap: OpenAI
agenda.description: What's coming from OpenAI and how enterprise builders can leverage it. Live demo and Q&A.

agenda.title: Demo Roadmap: AWS
agenda.description: AI/ML services roadmap, enterprise patterns, and what's new on the AWS AI stack.

agenda.title: Demo Roadmap: WSO2
agenda.description: Integration-first AI strategy, API management, and composable enterprise architecture.

agenda.title: Panel: Agents & the Agentic Enterprise
agenda.speaker: Moderator: [TBD]  |  Panelists: [TBD]
agenda.description: How autonomous AI agents are reshaping enterprise workflows, decision-making, and operations. What does an agentic future look like?

agenda.title: Lunch & Vendor Office Hours
agenda.description: Lunch is served — all expenses covered by WIT. Vendors (OpenAI, AWS, WSO2) available in conference rooms for builder and business Q&A.

agenda.title: Panel: GenAI Governance — Innovation Meets Guardrails
agenda.speaker: GenAI Review Group  |  Moderator: [TBD]
agenda.description: The GenAI Review Group discusses balancing rapid innovation with governance, risk management, and responsible AI practices.

agenda.title: Vendor Office Hours (continued)
agenda.description: Extended one-on-one time with OpenAI, AWS, and WSO2 in designated conference rooms. Bring your architecture questions.

agenda.title: Reverse Mentorship Launch
agenda.description: Announcing the new Reverse Mentorship program. Mentor reveal and open call for mentee applications.

agenda.title: Passing the Torch — WIT 2027 & Beyond
agenda.description: Celebrating the journey so far and introducing the next chapter of Women in Technology leadership.

agenda.title: Closing Remarks & Networking
agenda.description: Thank you, next steps, and informal networking to wrap up the day.

mentorship.headline: Reverse Mentorship Program — AI & Data
mentorship.subtitle: Bridging generations of expertise in AI, data strategy, and emerging technology.
mentorship.body: The WIT Reverse Mentorship program pairs emerging professionals with senior leaders to exchange knowledge on AI, data engineering, machine learning, and data-driven decision-making. Mentors share deep domain expertise and organizational context; mentees bring fresh perspectives on the latest AI tools, data platforms, and modern development practices. Together, both sides grow — accelerating AI adoption while grounding it in real business experience.
mentorship.ctaBody: Whether you want to mentor or be mentored, we want to hear from you. Mentor and mentee selections will be announced at the event. Applications are now open for both roles.
